title: Umami Crumbly Peruvian Dates Creme Brulee
description: A rich and indulgent dessert perfect for date nights, featuring creamy dates baked with almond milk and topped with a crispy caramelized sugar crust.
instructions: Heat almond milk in a saucepan over medium heat until warm but not boiling.
Add chopped dates, sugar, and salt to the hot milk. Stir gently to combine.
Pour mixture into individual ramekins or small ovenproof dishes.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes, or until the custard is just set but still a bit jiggly in the center.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before topping with ground almonds.

For caramelization: Place each crumble on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Sprinkle some granulated sugar over the top of each and drizzle lightly with water to create steam for caramelizing. Bake at 425°F (218°C) until golden brown, about 7-10 minutes per side.
